title: Pairs with given sum II
hints: Use two pointers approach starting from both ends of the sorted array.
When A[i] + A[j] == B, count all pairs with these values.
If A[i] == A[j], count all pairs in that range using combination formula: n*(n-1)/2.
If A[i] != A[j], count duplicates on left (l) and right (r), then add l*r to answer.
Move pointers based on whether current sum is less than or greater than B.
